source.note: ILLUSTRATIVE PLACEHOLDER — not a verified item; Lean code has NOT been type-checked

nl_problem: Show that for every natural number n, n + 0 = n.
faithful_statement: theorem ex0002 (n : ℕ) : n + 0 = n := by sorry

negatives.statement: theorem ex0002 (n : ℤ) : n + 0 = n := by sorry
theorem ex0002 (n : ℕ) (h : n + 0 = n) : n + 0 = n := by exact h
